function.name: summarize_news_by_keyword
function.description: Summarize recent news articles by keyword.
function.long_description: Fetches recent news articles related to a specific keyword and provides short summaries of the articles using content from an external news API.

keyword.description: Keyword to search for in news articles

example_user_queries: Summarize recent news about artificial intelligence.
Give me a news summary for the keyword inflation.
Summarize the latest news related to electric vehicles.
What is happening in the news about climate change?
Provide a short summary of recent articles on semiconductors.
Summarize news coverage for the keyword space exploration.
Show me a summary of news about interest rates.
What is the latest news summary for cybersecurity?
Summarize current news mentioning renewable energy.
Give me a concise news summary on the topic layoffs.
